description: Manual seed profiles for independent A-share sector valuation and fundamental modules. These are explicit editable inputs, not live provider facts. Update them after nightly review or replace them with provider-generated fields later.

score_convention.valuation_position_score: Negative means cheaper than its own/history-relative comfort zone; positive means more expensive.
score_convention.fundamental_score: Positive means improving or resilient fundamentals; negative means deterioration or value-trap risk.
score_convention.flow_price_score: Read from sector_flow_review.json and kept independent from this profile file.
